abstract: Production-ready Tailwind CSS Grid bento layout patterns for designing asymmetric, visually dynamic component layouts. Includes 8+ patterns with responsive breakpoints: 2×2 equal grids, 1 large + 2 small configurations, L-shape hero layouts, dashboard panels, 3-column magazines, asymmetric showcases, metrics bars, and masonry alternatives. Each pattern includes complete Tailwind code, mobile/tablet/desktop variants, and anti-patterns to avoid.
